Overview
Jobs
Life
About us
OpenText is a leading Cloud and AI company that provides organizations around the world with a comprehensive suite of Business AI, Business Clouds, and Business Technology. We help organizations grow, innovate, become more efficient and effective, and do so in a trusted and secure way—through Information Management.

OpenText (NASDAQ/TSX: OTEX), founded in 1991 in Waterloo, has a rich history of helping customers manage their most important asset—information. Originating from a collaboration to digitize the Oxford English Dictionary, OpenText has grown into a global leader in information management. With over 120,000 enterprise customers across 180 countries, OpenText supports 98 of the top 100 global companies. A wide breadth of offerings uniquely positions OpenText to help customers unlock the value of that information using Al, cloud, and security innovations.

At OpenText, our culture is at the heart of everything we do—and today, that includes being proudly AI-first. We’re creating a workplace where everyone can thrive, with artificial intelligence integrated into how we work, solve problems, and innovate together.

By fostering a collaborative and inclusive environment, we empower digital knowledge workers and drive forward-thinking solutions that shape the future of information management. We believe our success comes from the strength of our team—talent that AI can’t replace—and we’re committed to attracting and supporting those who bring unique insight, adaptability, and creativity.
Because at OpenText, people aren’t just our greatest asset—they’re the reason we shine in an AI-powered world. Join us at OpenText and become part of a team where your talents and ideas are truly valued.

Today we wrapped up an energizing day at our Europe Sales Kickoff!

From strategic discussions and client-focused insights to celebrating achievements and planning for future growth, the week was filled with opportunities to learn, collaborate, and build momentum for the year ahead.

We're leaving Berlin inspired, aligned, and ready to execute. Thank you to everyone who helped make this Europe Sales Kickoff a memorable and impactful experience. Here's to a successful year ahead.
#TeamOpenText

Great to see Team OpenText coming together to make a difference, from planting 1,500 trees to supporting local families through clothing donations.
#OT4Good
#TeamOpenText
OpenText Philippines
3,950 followers
1w
Growing a greener future, together. 🌱

On June 26, 2026, 97 OpenText volunteers joined hands with our longtime partner FEED for the third year of our annual tree-planting initiative at the UP Laguna-Quezon Land Grant (LQLG).

Together, our volunteers planted 1,500 tree seedlings across two restoration sites—contributing to forest recovery, biodiversity conservation, and a more sustainable future for generations to come.

But our impact extended beyond the environment. Through a company-wide clothing donation drive, OpenText employees also donated nine large bags of clothing to families in Barangay Maunlad, helping provide much-needed support to the local community.

This initiative is a powerful reminder that meaningful change happens when people come together with a shared purpose. Whether planting trees, supporting communities, or volunteering their time, our employees continue to demonstrate the values that make OpenText a force for good.

A heartfelt thank you to every volunteer who dedicated their time, energy, and passion to this cause. Small actions, when multiplied by many, create lasting impact.
#OT4Good
#TeamOpenText
#BuhayOpenText

What happens when a trusted ransomware negotiator secretly works for the very hackers he's supposed to stop? 🤯 

In this newly released episode of
#ReimaginingCyber
, we unpack one of the most shocking insider threat cases in recent cybersecurity history.

Whether you're a CISO, security leader, IT professional, or simply interested in cybersecurity, this episode offers practical lessons on trust, risk, and protecting sensitive information when every decision matters.

Listen now on Apple Podcasts:
https://apple.co/4aPmj5W

What a week at OpenText Kickoff and Sales Kickoff, our annual employee kickoffs for the new fiscal year.

The excitement extended far beyond Toronto, with Site Events taking place in OpenText offices around the world. These local gatherings gave colleagues the opportunity to connect, celebrate our accomplishments, and align on the priorities that will guide us through FY27.

We're excited to build on this momentum in the year ahead.
#TeamOpenText
